inputs.text: Mujhe bukhar ho gayi hai, bahut tezi se bukhar chadha hai, sir bahut dard kar raha hai

hypotheses.label: Chikungunya
hypotheses.rationale: Acute onset of high fever and severe headache

hypotheses.label: Viral fever
hypotheses.rationale: Sudden onset of high fever and headache

hypotheses.label: Dengue
hypotheses.rationale: High fever and headache, but needs more symptoms to confirm

inputs.text: Aankhon ke peeche dard ho raha hai, haddiyan toot rahi hain, bukhar abhi bhi hai

hypotheses.label: Dengue
hypotheses.rationale: Retro-orbital pain and bone pain are characteristic of Dengue

hypotheses.label: Chikungunya
hypotheses.rationale: Joint pain and fever, but retro-orbital pain is more typical of Dengue

hypotheses.label: Viral fever
hypotheses.rationale: Fever and headache, but lacks specific symptoms of Dengue or Chikungunya

inputs.text: Bukhar kam ho gayi hai, lal daane nikaal aa rahe hain, masoodon se khoon aa raha hai

hypotheses.label: Dengue
hypotheses.rationale: Fever drop, rash, and bleeding gums are cardinal signs of Dengue

hypotheses.label: Viral fever
hypotheses.rationale: Fever and rash, but bleeding gums are more specific to Dengue

hypotheses.label: Malaria
hypotheses.rationale: Fever and chills, but lacks specific symptoms of Dengue

inputs.text: Abhi bhi bahut kamzori mehsoos ho rahi hai, lekin bukhar toh kam ho gayi hai
inputs.image_desc: prescription and blood test report shown

hypotheses.label: Dengue
hypotheses.rationale: Recovery from Dengue fever, but patient still weak

hypotheses.label: Viral fever
hypotheses.rationale: Ruled out, as Dengue fever is confirmed

hypotheses.label: Malaria
hypotheses.rationale: Ruled out, as symptoms do not match Malaria
